docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,762.35 FILED BY KEY OK SOON AS TO DEFENDANT BARROW JEFFREY ROSS WINTER SUZANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY BARROW JEFFREY ROSS WINTER SUZANNE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KEY OK SOON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEY OK SOON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARROW JEFFREY ROSS WINTER SUZANNE $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,365.00, PLTF MAY RETAIN DEPOSIT TO COVER JUDGMENT. IF DE- POSIT IS RETAINED, BOTH OBLIGATIONS ON COMPLAINT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BARROW JEFFREY ROSS WINTER SUZANNE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT KEY OK SOON $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,365.00, DEFENDANTS MAY FORFEIT DEPOSIT TO PAY JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
